base_policy_id.description: Unique ID for the base policy used in inheritance

child_policies.description: List of IDs for policies derived from the base policy

dns.description: DNS settings including FQDN and proxy configurations

firewalls.description: List of IDs for firewalls associated with the policy

location.description: Azure region where the firewall policy is deployed

rule_collection_groups.description: IDs of rule collection groups linked to the policy

tags.description: Key-value pairs for categorizing the firewall policy

threat_intelligence_allowlist.description: Allowlist of FQDNs and IPs for threat intelligence

threat_intelligence_mode.description: Operational mode for threat intelligence settings
